problem_text_cn:
3-14 如图3-18所示，两根长度同为$l$的轻杆用质量$m$的球形铰链相接，两杆另一端分别连接质量$m$和$2m$的小球。开始时两杆并拢竖立在光滑水平面上，铰链球在上，而后从静止释放，下面两球朝两侧滑动，两杆始终在同一竖直平面内。略去所有阻力，试求：
(1) 铰链球碰到桌面时的速度；
(2) 两杆夹角为$90^{\circ}$时，质量为$2m$的小球速度。
problem_text_en:
3-14 As shown in Figure 3-18, two light rods of equal length $l$ are connected by a spherical hinge of mass $m$. The other ends of the rods are attached to small balls of masses $m$ and $2m$, respectively. Initially, the two rods are placed side by side, standing upright on a smooth horizontal surface, with the hinge ball at the top. The system is released from rest, and the two lower balls slide outward. The two rods always remain in the same vertical plane. Neglecting all resistance, determine:
(1) The velocity of the hinge ball when it hits the table.
(2) The velocity of the $2m$ ball when the angle between the two rods becomes $90^{\circ}$.
problem_solution_cn:
解 (1) 水平方向动量守恒，铰链球与桌面相碰时，三球的水平速度同为零，只是铰链球有竖直向下速度$u$。联合地面，据机械能守恒可得
$$ \frac{1}{2} m u^{2}=m g l,\quad u=\sqrt{2 g l}. $$
(2) 参考图3-19，由水平方向动量守恒可得
$$ v_{1}+u_{1}=2v_{2},\quad\text{①} $$
由机械能守恒可得
$$ \frac{1}{2} m v_{1}^{2}+\frac{1}{2} m\left(u_{1}^{2}+u_{2}^{2}\right)+\frac{1}{2}(2 m) v_{2}^{2}=m g l\left(1-\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right), $$
即
$$ v_{1}^{2}+\left(u_{1}^{2}+u_{2}^{2}\right)+2 v_{2}^{2}=(2-\sqrt{2}) g l.\quad\text{②} $$
又由运动关联
$$ v_{1}\cos 45^{\circ}=\left(u_{1}+u_{2}\right)\cos 45^{\circ}, $$
$$ v_{2}\cos 45^{\circ}=\left(u_{2}-u_{1}\right)\cos 45^{\circ}, $$
得
$$ v_{1}=u_{1}+u_{2},\quad v_{2}=u_{2}-u_{1}.\quad\text{③} $$
联立①②③式，可解得质量$2m$的小球速度为
$$ v_{2}=\sqrt{\frac{3}{10}\left(1-\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)gl}. $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution (1) Horizontal momentum is conserved. When the hinge ball collides with the table, the horizontal velocities of all three balls are zero; only the hinge ball has a vertical downward velocity $u$. Using mechanical energy conservation with the ground, we have
$$ \frac{1}{2} m u^{2}=m g l,\quad u=\sqrt{2 g l}. $$
(2) Referring to Figure 3-19, conservation of horizontal momentum gives
$$ v_{1}+u_{1}=2v_{2},\quad\text{①} $$
and mechanical energy conservation gives
$$ \frac{1}{2} m v_{1}^{2}+\frac{1}{2} m\left(u_{1}^{2}+u_{2}^{2}\right)+\frac{1}{2}(2 m) v_{2}^{2}=m g l\left(1-\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right), $$
i.e.
$$ v_{1}^{2}+\left(u_{1}^{2}+u_{2}^{2}\right)+2 v_{2}^{2}=(2-\sqrt{2}) g l.\quad\text{②} $$
From the kinematic constraints,
$$ v_{1}\cos 45^{\circ}=\left(u_{1}+u_{2}\right)\cos 45^{\circ}, $$
$$ v_{2}\cos 45^{\circ}=\left(u_{2}-u_{1}\right)\cos 45^{\circ}, $$
we obtain
$$ v_{1}=u_{1}+u_{2},\quad v_{2}=u_{2}-u_{1}.\quad\text{③} $$
Solving equations ①, ②, and ③ simultaneously, the velocity of the $2m$ ball is
$$ v_{2}=\sqrt{\frac{3}{10}\left(1-\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)gl}. $$
img_cn:
图3-18展示了初始状态：两根长度同为$l$的轻杆，通过一个质量为$m$的球形铰链连接，两杆另一端分别悬挂质量为$m$和$2m$的小球。两杆并拢竖立在光滑水平面上，铰链球位于最上方。

 图中标注了各球质量、杆长及几何关系，整体系统静止。
img_en:
Figure 3-18 shows the initial state: Two light rods of equal length $l$ are connected by a spherical hinge of mass $m$. The other ends of the rods are attached to small balls of masses $m$ and $2m$, respectively. The rods are placed side by side, standing upright on a smooth horizontal surface, with the hinge ball at the top.

 The diagram labels the masses, the rod length, and the geometry. The entire system is at rest.
